prompt: 직무와 관련된 본인의 경험 및 역량을 구체적으로 서술해 주세요. (500자 이내)

assertions.text: Answer is 500 characters or fewer (including spaces)
Answer is primarily in Korean (>30% Korean characters)
Uses 존댓말 consistently (sentences end with 습니다/입니다)
No explicit STAR headers as standalone labels
Contains at least 1 specific metric from CV
References a specific project or role from the candidate's actual CV (TripleH, Ebit, DeepLearning.AI, or JobHunt AI)
